definitions.text: Separable, capable of being treated separately.
Consisting of a number more than one (especially, more than two) but not very many.
examples: Several cars were in the parking lot.
They had many journals. I subscribed to several.

definitions.text: An area of land in private ownership (as opposed to common land).
Each particular taken singly; an item; a detail; an individual. (Can we add an example for this sense?)
An enclosed or separate place; enclosure. (Can we add an example for this sense?)
